base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_wizard_idle — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Wizard (yellow variant) — late-game caster enemy with Hurtmore (stronger spell). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wizard (yellow variant) — late-game caster enemy with Hurtmore (stronger spell)
